title: aliciella humillima
intro: Aliciella humillima, also known as the dwarf aliciella, is a species of flowering plant in the borage family (Boraginaceae). The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing. Aliciella humillima is typically prepared as a herbal tea or tincture for medicinal use, and its extracts are also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
